programme.title: Riviera Revenge
programme.desc: After learning that his wife had an affair 40 years ago, Francois swears he will avenge his honour. 2024. France. Director: Ivan Calberac. Starring: Andre Dussollier, Sabine Azema.

programme.title: White Man Walking
programme.desc: Following the murder of George Floyd, Rob Bliss embarks on a grueling 1500 mile walk through the southern states of America. 2025. USA. Directors: Denise Alder, Rob Bliss.

programme.title: Oh, Canada
programme.desc: An ailing filmmaker has his story told, but as life is separated from myth, hard truths rise to the surface. 2024. Canada, USA. Director: Paul Schrader. Starring: Richard Gere, Uma Thurman.

programme.title: Bob Trevino Likes It
programme.desc: Lily Trevino begins an enriching freindship with a man sharing her father's name, Bob Trevino. 2024. USA. Director: Tracie Laymon. Starring: Barbie Ferreira, John Leguizamo.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A man left battling anterograde amnesia uses notes and tattoos to hunt down the man who murdered his wife. 2000. United States. Director: Christopher Nolan. Starring: Guy Pearce, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: Ad Astra
programme.desc: One man follows in his fathers footsteps to mission across the universe to investigate a mysterious phenomenon. 2019. USA, China. Director: James Gray. Starring: Brad Pitt, Tommy Lee Jones.

programme.title: Janet Planet
programme.desc: Lacy spends summer at home with her mother Janet. Her wild imagination captivates everyone around her. 2023. USA, UK. Director: Annie Baker. Starring: Zoe Ziegler, Luke Philip Bosco.

programme.title: Murdered By a Mob: The Killing of Bijan Ebrahimi
programme.desc: Examine the murder of Bijan Ebrahimi, tageted by a hate-fuelled vigilante mob, on the belief he was a paedophile. 2021. UK. Director: Steven Grandison.

programme.title: Infiniti
programme.desc: 1/1. In the deep silence of outer space, a complex docking manoeuvre at the ISS has gone dangerously wrong. 2022. France. Director: Thierry Poiraud. Starring: Celine Sallette, Daniyar Alshinov.

programme.title: Infiniti
programme.desc: 1/2. Isaak begins to think he may be on the trail of a cosmonaut killer. 2022. France. Director: Thierry Poiraud. Starring: Celine Sallette, Daniyar Alshinov.

programme.title: Infiniti
programme.desc: 1/3. Anna and Isaak are on the run with, Belinski, the head of security, on their heels. 2022. France. Director: Thierry Poiraud. Starring: Celine Sallette, Daniyar Alshinov.

programme.title: Infiniti
programme.desc: 1/4. Lydia and Reva's investigation leads them to the archives of MIR. 2022. France. Director: Thierry Poiraud. Starring: Celine Sallette, Daniyar Alshinov.

programme.title: Infiniti
programme.desc: 1/5. The ISS responds: the crew are alive and well. Durkov confirms the rescue mission and Anna prepares for the departure. 2022. France. Director: Thierry Poiraud. Starring: Celine Sallette.

programme.title: Infiniti
programme.desc: 1/6. Isaak discovers the events that took place in MIR 25 years earlier and unlocks the secret of the killer's identity. 2022. France. Director: Thierry Poiraud. Starring: Celine Sallette.

programme.title: Bob Trevino Likes It
programme.desc: Lily Trevino begins an enriching freindship with a man sharing her father's name, Bob Trevino. 2024. USA. Director: Tracie Laymon. Starring: Barbie Ferreira, John Leguizamo.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A man left battling anterograde amnesia uses notes and tattoos to hunt down the man who murdered his wife. 2000. United States. Director: Christopher Nolan. Starring: Guy Pearce, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: Ad Astra
programme.desc: One man follows in his fathers footsteps to mission across the universe to investigate a mysterious phenomenon. 2019. USA, China. Director: James Gray. Starring: Brad Pitt, Tommy Lee Jones.

programme.title: Janet Planet
programme.desc: Lacy spends summer at home with her mother Janet. Her wild imagination captivates everyone around her. 2023. USA, UK. Director: Annie Baker. Starring: Zoe Ziegler, Luke Philip Bosco.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A man left battling anterograde amnesia uses notes and tattoos to hunt down the man who murdered his wife. 2000. United States. Director: Christopher Nolan. Starring: Guy Pearce, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: Words And Pictures
programme.desc: An english and art teacher prove if words or pictures are more important. 2013. USA, Canada, Australia. Director: Fred Schepisi. Starring: Clive Owen, Juliette Binoche, Bruce Davison.

programme.title: Varda By Agnes
programme.desc: Agnes Varda, filmmaker, photographer, and storyteller, recounts the intricacies of her life and career at the break of the 'Nouvelle Vague'. 2019. France. Director: Agnes Varda.

programme.title: The Great Lillian Hall
programme.desc: Lillian Hall has never missed a show, but conspiracy threatens to drop the curtain on her career. 2024. USA. Director: Michael Cristofer. Starring: Jessica Lange, Kathy Bates.

programme.title: Grand Tour
